summary: Forensic QA re-test after latest fixes. All client-facing issues verified as RESOLVED. Ops Advisory navigation stays in-app, Soundboard never asks for API keys, dark BIQc styling consistent.

features_tested.feature: Ops Advisory nav path from sidebar to /ops-advisory
features_tested.details: Navigation from sidebar Intelligence > Operations > Ops Advisory stays in-app. Direct URL /ops-advisory also works correctly. Tier-gated feature shows /upgrade for free users as expected.

features_tested.feature: Ops Advisory page styling matches dark BIQc app style
features_tested.details: Page has dark background, orange accents (#FF6A00), sidebar present, header 'Strategic Intelligence', explainability strip with WHY sections, OPS ADVISORY OWNER PLAN card, Soundboard panel on right. No website-style mismatch.

features_tested.feature: Soundboard should never ask user for API keys
features_tested.details: Soundboard page and panel show 'Share what's on your mind...' input. No API key prompts found. BIQc Auto mode selector works. Uses backend-configured API keys.
All 9 routes accessible and stay in-app: /advisor, /soundboard, /revenue, /operations, /risk, /alerts, /war-room, /board-room, /ops-advisory
User dropdown opens with Settings, Upgrade Plan, Sign Out. Sidebar sections (INTELLIGENCE, EXECUTION, SETTINGS & GROWTH, BIQC LEGAL) expand/collapse correctly.

test_results.ops_advisory_nav: PASS - Stays in-app, no external redirect
test_results.ops_advisory_style: PASS - Dark BIQc app style with proper cards, headers, explainability
test_results.soundboard_api_keys: PASS - No API key prompts, uses backend config
test_results.user_dropdown: PASS - Shows Settings, Upgrade Plan, Sign Out

seed_data_creation: Used existing QA user from iteration_116/118
context_for_next_testing_agent: All client-facing regressions verified as RESOLVED. Ops Advisory stays in-app and matches dark BIQc style. Soundboard does NOT ask for API keys. All protected routes accessible. Nav/dropdown/toggle interactions working.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All issues resolved in previous iterations
